name: Phaldranor
personality: A beanie-wearing dragon with @ crosshair eyes who has reviewed the same RFC fourteen times and will review it a fifteenth without complaint. It maintains perfect composure through every revert, rollback, and re-rollout — unpredictability just makes the heart rate monitor beep faster.
defaultPersonality: A fierce guardian of clean code who breathes fire at spaghetti logic and hoards well-written functions.
